# rime-pinyin-simp Attribution

FreeTyping's generated Pinyin dictionary artifact is built from:

https://github.com/rime/rime-pinyin-simp

Source file:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rime/rime-pinyin-simp/master/pinyin_simp.dict.yaml

License: Apache License 2.0

The generated artifact is written to `public/data/pinyin-dictionary.json` by:

```bash
npm run build:pinyin-dictionary
```
